tasks.label: coding-style: pre-commit check
tasks.detail: Equivalent of on-pre-commit-coding-style hook. Evaluates all staged *.java files against Mastercard PGS coding-style rules (copyright, Java style, Javadoc, SonarQube-clean structure, naming, backward-compat, SOLID). BLOCKER/HIGH findings must be resolved before committing.

tasks.label: coding-style: phase-start sweep (Phase 4 / Phase 5)
tasks.detail: Equivalent of on-phase-start-coding-style hook. Runs a full Checkstyle sweep across all *.java files in the current module before Code Development (Phase 4) or Code Review (Phase 5) begins. Non-blocking — surfaces pre-existing style debt as baseline.

tasks.label: build: compile (fast)
tasks.detail: Run mvn clean compile -q. Should pass before every commit.

tasks.label: build: test
tasks.detail: Run mvn test -q. Must pass zero failures before raising a PR.
